shot_notes: Tars Tarkas assigns Sola to care for the Narrator
evidence_summary: Move the narrative from a high-stakes public performance within the grand audience chamber to a private, intimate setting focused on physical recovery. The scene establishes Sola as a caregiver and introduces her presence through a direct assignment by Tars...
The Narrator refuses further performance until his hunger is addressed. Tars Tarkas assigns Sola to look after him. Sola begins the process of providing sustenance.
The Narrator is physically depleted amidst the grandeur of the audience chamber.
Sola begins providing nourishment to a fatigued Narrator in a private area.
Negotiation for food leads to the assignment of caregiving duties.
